error_detail: Gamma generate page textarea does not accept SendKeys, clipboard paste, or Tab navigation input. Custom React contenteditable rejects all automation methods.
notes: manual_input_required - Gamma generate textarea (gamma.app/create/generate) is a custom input that blocks all automated text entry. Logged in successfully, navigated to generate page, but cannot enter prompt text. Input methods tried: SetCursorPos+mouse_event click + Clipboard paste, SendKeys, Tab navigation. All failed.
